title: Set up project structure and configuration
description: Create the base Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and required dependencies

title: Create core type definitions and utilities
description: Define TypeScript interfaces for all entities and create utility functions

title: Implement in-memory data store and seed data
description: Create the singleton store with Maps/Arrays and seed with initial mock data

title: Build authentication library and session management
description: Implement cookie-based auth with bcryptjs and iron-session pattern

title: Create reusable UI components
description: Build foundational UI components (Button, Input, Modal, etc.) with Tailwind

title: Implement toast notification system
description: Create toast context, hook, and component for user feedback

title: Build authentication API routes
description: Create register, login, logout, and session check endpoints

title: Create authentication pages
description: Build login and registration pages with forms

title: Implement authentication hooks
description: Create useAuth hook for managing user session state

title: Build layout components
description: Create Navbar and Footer components for consistent layout

title: Create recipe UI components
description: Build reusable recipe components (Card, Grid, Rating, etc.)

title: Implement recipe API routes
description: Create CRUD endpoints for recipes, ratings, comments, and saves

title: Build homepage and recipe browsing
description: Create main landing page with recipe grid and search

title: Create recipe detail page
description: Build individual recipe page with full details and interactions

title: Build recipe creation and editing
description: Create form for creating/editing recipes with dynamic fields

title: Create user profile components
description: Build profile header, stats, and related UI components

title: Implement user API routes
description: Create endpoints for user profiles, following, and user recipes

title: Build user profile pages
description: Create public profile view and profile editing pages

title: Create feed and saved recipes API routes
description: Implement endpoints for personalized feed and saved recipes

title: Build feed and saved recipes pages
description: Create pages for viewing followed users' recipes and saved collections

title: Implement admin API routes
description: Create endpoints for admin user and recipe management

title: Build admin dashboard page
description: Create admin interface for content moderation and user management

title: Create recipe data hooks
description: Implement useRecipes hook for fetching and managing recipe data

title: Final integration and testing
description: Test all pages, fix any integration issues, and verify all features work together
